notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Charles McAdoo grounds into a force out, shortstop Gunnar Henderson to second baseman Jackson Holliday. Ernie Clement scores. Yohendrick Piñango out at 2nd. Charles McAdoo to 1st. Throwing error by second baseman Jackson Holliday.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Charles McAdoo grounds into a force out, shortstop Gunnar Henderson to second baseman Jackson Holliday. Ernie Clement scores. Yohendrick Piñango out at 2nd. Charles McAdoo to 1st. Throwing error by second baseman Jackson Holliday.

notableEvents.label: Charles McAdoo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Charles McAdoo grounds into a double play, second baseman Jackson Holliday to shortstop Gunnar Henderson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Jesús Sánchez out at 2nd. Charles McAdoo out at 1st.
